page_content:
ARTT498 Directed Studies in Studio Art (1-3 Credits)

Advanced independent work in Studio Art. Meeting with faculty and studio time arranged.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art department.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

ARTT499 Directed Studies in Graphic Design (1-3 Credits)

Advanced independent studies in Graphic Design. Meetings with faculty and studio time arranged.
